title: A Spot of Bother at the Gate
opening: Good afternoon. If you could just present your boarding pass and passport, please. Hmm, I'm just having a spot of bother pulling up your reservation here. Is this the correct flight number, AC792 to Toronto?

t1.prompt: Good afternoon. If you could just present your boarding pass and passport, please. Hmm, I'm just having a spot of bother pulling up your reservation here. Is this the correct flight number, AC792 to Toronto?
t1.promptTranslation: Good afternoon. If you could just present your boarding pass and passport, please. Hmm, I'm just having a spot of bother pulling up your reservation here. Is this the correct flight number, AC792 to Toronto? — Good afternoon. If you could just present your boarding pass and passport, please. Hmm, I'm just having a spot of bother pulling up your reservation here. Is this the correct flight number, AC792 to Toronto?

t2.prompt: Right, it seems there's been a slight hiccup. Your ticket, while valid for AC792, appears to be for tomorrow's departure. A common oversight, I assure you.
t2.promptTranslation: Right, it seems there's been a slight hiccup. Your ticket, while valid for AC792, appears to be for tomorrow's departure. A common oversight, I assure you. — Right, it seems there's been a slight hiccup. Your ticket, while valid for AC792, appears to be for tomorrow's departure. A common oversight, I assure you.

t3.prompt: Ah, I see. That explains it! You're actually at the gate for flight AC792 to Toronto, but you're booked on AC801 to Vancouver. Entirely different kettle of fish, I'm afraid.
t3.promptTranslation: Ah, I see. That explains it! You're actually at the gate for flight AC792 to Toronto, but you're booked on AC801 to Vancouver. Entirely different kettle of fish, I'm afraid. — Ah, I see. That explains it! You're actually at the gate for flight AC792 to Toronto, but you're booked on AC801 to Vancouver. Entirely different kettle of fish, I'm afraid.

t4.prompt: Not to worry, these things happen. Let me see what we can do. It looks like we have a couple of seats remaining on an earlier flight this evening, albeit in economy plus. Would you be amenable to that, or perhaps we can rebook you for tomorrow with a complimentary lounge pass?
t4.promptTranslation: Not to worry, these things happen. Let me see what we can do. It looks like we have a couple of seats remaining on an earlier flight this evening, albeit in economy plus. Would you be amenable to that, or perhaps we can rebook you for tomorrow with a complimentary lounge pass? — Not to worry, these things happen. Let me see what we can do. It looks like we have a couple of seats remaining on an earlier flight this evening, albeit in economy plus. Would you be amenable to that, or perhaps we can rebook you for tomorrow with a complimentary lounge pass?

t5.prompt: No harm done, it's easily done in these sprawling terminals! Your gate for AC801 to Vancouver is Gate B17, just a hop, skip, and a jump down this concourse, then a left after the duty-free shop. You've got about an hour and a half before boarding commences.
t5.promptTranslation: No harm done, it's easily done in these sprawling terminals! Your gate for AC801 to Vancouver is Gate B17, just a hop, skip, and a jump down this concourse, then a left after the duty-free shop. You've got about an hour and a half before boarding commences. — No harm done, it's easily done in these sprawling terminals! Your gate for AC801 to Vancouver is Gate B17, just a hop, skip, and a jump down this concourse, then a left after the duty-free shop. You've got about an hour and a half before boarding commences.

t6.prompt: Excellent choice. I've just processed the change for you. Here's your new boarding pass. Do double-check the details, especially the gate and boarding time. Have a truly wonderful journey!
t6.promptTranslation: Excellent choice. I've just processed the change for you. Here's your new boarding pass. Do double-check the details, especially the gate and boarding time. Have a truly wonderful journey! — Excellent choice. I've just processed the change for you. Here's your new boarding pass. Do double-check the details, especially the gate and boarding time. Have a truly wonderful journey!

t-repeat.prompt: Sorry, could you run that by me again? I didn't quite catch what you said.
t-repeat.promptTranslation: Sorry, could you run that by me again? I didn't quite catch what you said. — Sorry, could you run that by me again? I didn't quite catch what you said.

t-end.prompt: Right then, have a superb flight and enjoy your destination. Thanks for your patience!
t-end.promptTranslation: Right then, have a superb flight and enjoy your destination. Thanks for your patience! — Right then, have a superb flight and enjoy your destination. Thanks for your patience!
